privileged_info_summary: The expected proxy host ('cache.engineering.edu'), proxy port ('8080'), and proxy bypass settings ('localhost; 10.0.0.*') are completely synthetic and are explicitly defined in the task description for the agent to configure in the 'Engineering Basics' configuration node. There is no external or real dataset involved.
